description: Run Hansl/Gretl econometrics workflows via MCP with GUI launch and artifacts.
name: io.github.OndrejLapes/gretl-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit path to gretlcli or gretlcli.exe.
environmentVariables.name: GRETL_CLI

environmentVariables.description: Optional explicit path to the visible Gretl GUI executable.
environmentVariables.name: GRETL_GUI

environmentVariables.description: Optional parent directory for Gretl run workspaces and generated artifacts.
environmentVariables.name: GRETLMCP_WORKSPACE_DIR

environmentVariables.description: Set to false to prevent script-running tools from opening visible Gretl GUI windows by default.
environmentVariables.name: GRETLMCP_OPEN_GUI

title: Gretl MCP
